programme.title: THE HEROIC QUEST OF THE VALIANT PRINCE IVANDOE S1
programme.desc: In an effort to impress Jezebel the thiefstress, Prince Ivandoe and Bert set off to find the elusive Centicore.

programme.title: THE HEROIC QUEST OF THE VALIANT PRINCE IVANDOE S1
programme.desc: Prince Ivandoe vows to capture the turnip thief... the very worst type of thief!

programme.title: SUPERMAN II
programme.desc: The cosmic battle for world supremacy begins as Superman inadvertently releases three powerful exiled Kyrptonians and must stop them at all cost!

programme.title: HAPPILY EVER AFTER: FAIRY TALES FOR EVERY CHILD S2
programme.desc: In this animated series, actor Will Smith voices Pinocchio and the predicaments he faces in order to become a real boy.

programme.title: BEN 10 S3
programme.desc: When Grandpa Max's engineer buddy Phil Billings gifts Team Tennyson the Omni-Copter - a state of the art flying vehicle that can transport the Rustbucket for overseas adventures.

programme.title: BEN 10 S3
programme.desc: During one last stop by a toy store before Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max's maiden voyage across the Atlantic, Ben runs into an old bully, Kevin 11, who now has new powers - able to transform into aliens just like Ben, such as the 'bootleg' doppelgänger of Cannonbolt-- Wreckingbolt!

programme.title: BEN 10 S3
programme.desc: Team Tennyson goes international in the Omni-Copter and the first stop is for a hike in the Scottish Highlands, but the weather isn't just bad, it's foggy, and that means one thing and one thing only: the return of The Fogg!

programme.title: BEN 10 S3
programme.desc: Back stateside, Ben can't get into a cat cosplay competition, Top Tail, without a costume of his own, but when he goes Rath - a new cat-like alien with an attitude - Ben's newfound wild side quickly becomes much more than he bargained for.

programme.title: BEN 10 S3
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max next travel to Castle Bishopbrook to visit a distant relative who's royalty, but when Ben encounters a 'ghost' at the haunted home, it turns out to actually be his new rival, Kevin 11, throwing even more twisted aliens his way: Thornblade, Undertow, and Dark Matter!

programme.title: RUBY AND THE WELL S1
programme.desc: When Daniel and Ruby move to the orchard home inherited from Daniel's eccentric uncle, it seems inhospitable - until Ruby discovers a magic well.

programme.title: THE HEROIC QUEST OF THE VALIANT PRINCE IVANDOE S1
programme.desc: Prince Ivandoe and Bert set off on their heroic quest and, almost immediately, a winged serpent steals their map to Eagle Mountain.

programme.title: THE HEROIC QUEST OF THE VALIANT PRINCE IVANDOE S1
programme.desc: A fire-breathing Giant Chicken is destroying the local farmers' prize vegetables. Prince Ivandoe vows to capture the Giant Chicken, but... gets captured by her instead.

programme.desc: When Prince Ivandoe valiantly sets free Brian the Bard, he discovers he is now stuck with him... until such time that Brian saves Prince Ivandoe's life in return.

programme.desc: June has been doing her Te Xuan Ze thing (acting as the Protector) for just over a month, and it's become a real hassle.

programme.title: THE LIFE & TIMES OF JUNIPER LEE S1
programme.desc: When June's school chorus goes to a nursing home to perform, Roger finds half of a cursed Viking medallion.

programme.title: THE LIFE & TIMES OF JUNIPER LEE S1
programme.desc: Every year on April Fools' Day, Orchid Bay City is overrun by practical jokes.

programme.title: STAR TREK: SECTION 31
programme.desc: Emperor Philippa Georgiou joins a secret division of Starfleet, tasked with protecting the United Federation of Planets.

programme.title: THE NATIONAL DOG SHOW ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world's largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. “The Dean” David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown. But which dog will...

programme.title: BEN 10 S3
programme.desc: While in Paris, France, Ben catches Zombozo robbing the Louvre, but when Zombozo hypnotizes Ben to remain speechless, Ben must navigate a foreign land like a mime in order to stop the criminal clown and his travelling circus.

programme.title: BEN 10 S3
programme.desc: A trip to the South Pole goes upside down when Team Tennyson lands on the North Pole instead, but Ben quickly discovers the culprits: Solar & Polar Twain, magnetically-powered scientists who want to hold the world ransom by threatening to reverse Earth's magnetic poles!

programme.title: BEN 10 S3
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max arrive at a Native American national park to witness the Ayasha Plinths - an ancient Stonehenge-like rock formation - but when the sinister sorcerer Hex arrives, Ben must battle against a beast Hex magically made out of huge rocks!

programme.title: BEN 10 S3
programme.desc: Team Tennyson checks out a Samurai Museum in Tokyo, where Ben is too impatient to wait out the Calligraphy experience for the more exciting-sounding Samurai one, but when a dangerous Samurai sword is stolen from the exhibit, Ben must take on its thief - the new Big Bad in town, the Forever Knight.

programme.title: BEN 10 S3
programme.desc: During a tour of the Japanese Robotics Museum, Ben finds hero-gone-wrong Tim Buktu 'trying to save' Tokyo from a Dragon, but has Tim finally turned over a new leaf, or is this just another one of his half-baked plans to play the part of hero?

programme.title: RUBY AND THE WELL S1
programme.desc: A wish involving a librarian, a treasure map and a new perspective all help Ruby discover that her love of helping others comes from her late mom.

programme.title: Rumah Hantu Pasar Malam
programme.desc: Misteri pembunuhan terjadi di pasar malam desa Sumber Sari. Namun daya tarik pasar malam tersebut seakan tidak pernah berhenti menarik pengunjungnya, termasuk kelima sahabat yang sedang mengunjungi desa tersebut.

programme.title: Bunga Cinta Kasih
programme.desc: Benih asmara tumbuh di antara dua remaja beda kasta yang terpilih menjadi pengurus kelas di sekolah mereka. Namun, hubungan cinta monyet tersebut harus menghadapi rintangan berat akibat terganjal restu orang tua.

programme.title: Pantai Selatan
programme.desc: Anak dari seorang wanita yang tewas di jurang akibat dipaksa menikah, diasuh oleh ular raksasa hingga dewasa. Tumbuh menjadi gadis cantik, ia menjadi perantara kutukan maut bagi setiap pria yang berani menggodanya.

programme.title: Curi-Curi Kesempatan
programme.desc: Akibat dijahili temannya, dua pria terpaksa menyamar sebagai perempuan demi melarikan diri dengan menyusup ke rombongan tur artis. Berbagai aksi jenaka pun terjadi saat mereka mencoba mendekati gadis-gadis di rombongan itu.

programme.title: Menerjang Badai
programme.desc: Dua sahabat dari latar belakang berbeda berjuang hidup bersama hingga terjebak dalam komplotan penyelundup emas. Kisah masa lalu yang penuh liku ini kemudian diceritakan kembali kepada anak-anak mereka di masa kini.

programme.title: Sang Pencerah
programme.desc: Sepulang dari Mekah, Darwis muda mengubah namanya menjadi Ahmad Dahlan. Seorang pemuda usia 21 tahun yang gelisah atas pelaksanaan syariat Islam yang melenceng ke arah sesat, Syirik dan Bid'ah.

programme.title: Cinta Tapi Beda
programme.desc: Sepasang kekasih yang berbeda keyakinan Diana dan Cahyo. Namun saat mereka mulai mencoba melanjutkan ke jenjang yang lebih serius, orang tua mereka sangat bertentangan dengan rencana ini.

programme.title: Hattrick
programme.desc: Bercerita tentang turnamen futsal internasional. Kebetulan tahun ini diadakan di Indonesia, maka dicarilah pemain-pemain terbaik dari seulurh Indonesia untuk dididik dan diikutkan dalam turnamen ini.

programme.title: Gentayangan
programme.desc: Abimanyu membawa istrinya, Sofia dan kedua anak mereka serta adiknya Sheila untuk menetap di hotel peninggalan orangtua di lembah gunung ratusan kilometer dari Jakarta, setelah dinyatakan bangkrut oleh pengadilan.

programme.title: Mangkujiwo
programme.desc: Awal mula lahirnya kuntilanak. Kanthi adalah perempuan biasa yang jadi korban perseteruan Brotoseno dan Cokrokusumo dalam memperebutkan pengaruh dan kekuasaan atas Loji Pusaka.

programme.title: Hantu Juga Selfie
programme.desc: Helsi meninggal karena selfie, ia meneror temen-teman semasa hidupnya ketika mereka melakukan selfie. Hal ini membuat teman-temanya ketakutan, apa lagi bukan hanya sosok Helsi yang ada dalam foto namun hantu-hantu kocak lainya

programme.title: Belahan Jiwa
programme.desc: Cerita tentang empat sahabat yang selalu setia bersama, dan ternyata mereka semua berhubungan dengan pria yang sama

programme.title: Perempuan-Perempuan Liar

programme.title: Satu Kecupan

programme.title: Mati Muda Di Pelukan Janda
programme.desc: Rahmat yang sejak kecil sudah ditinggal mati oleh kedua orang tuanya, tumbuh besar diasuh oleh seorang pemilik salon, mbak Bunga atau mas Bambang. Tempat tinggalnya berhadapan langsung dengan rumah yang ditempati

programme.title: Abbey Clancy: Celebrity Homes
programme.desc: Documentary series following model and podcaster Abbey Clancy in her dream job as she heads behind the doors of stylish and exclusive homes in the UK and Europe to meet glamorous and successful British women who share her passion for interior design - Abbey has overseen the design of her own beautiful home, and now she's knocking on the doors of other famous women to get an exclusive peek inside their homes to find out how they've each turned their house into a magnificent home. In this episode, Abbey is at home with former Sugababe Heidi Range to find out how she's turned a Victorian laundry factory into a stunning family home, and she also knocks on the door of former supermodel, racing car driver and presenter Jodie Kidd, who reveals how she's lovingly restored a 15th-century chocolate box cottage into a cosy home.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: It's the end of an era - Dan Edgar's bachelor pad, scene of some of the most infamous afterparties in Essex, is closing its doors and being relaunched in a new guise. It's now Dan and Amber's flat, and she's wasted no time in adding some female flourishes - Dan's about to swap nights on the Xbox with Diags for couples' dinner parties, but before he does, he invites the lads over to say goodbye to the flat properly. Will the boys be able to hold it together during their final farewell, and is Dan really ready to let the curtains close on the best bachelor pad of all time? Harry's had an emotional time following his breakup with Frankie - after some serious introspection, he's finally beginning to understand how his jealousy issues impact on his relationships. When Lockie - who's had his own share of relationship dramas - sees how down he is, he pulls him aside for a heart-to-heart. Can he advise Harry on how to handle his emotions, and can Harry begin to move on from the heartbreak?

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: US reality series peeking inside the unconventional lives of six successful women living in or around Salt Lake City, Utah. programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County

This is your chance to find out as comedy legend Lee Mack presents the ultimate leveller of a quiz show - it doesn't matter if you're not usually good at quizzes because the questions have nothing to do with remembering facts and are all about logic and common sense. This is the quiz that the whole family can play together - 100 contestants begin every show and try to make it to the end to answer a question that only one per cent of the country can get right and win up to 100,000 pounds.

programme.title: New: Love Island
programme.desc: Reality show. Glamorous singles live in a beautiful villa under the watchful gaze of an audience at home who have the power to decide who goes and who will win a huge cash prize. [S] S13 Ep33

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Animated comedy series about family life. After discovering she has a brother named Patrick whom she never knew about, Lois takes the family to meet him, only to discover he is in a mental institution. Patrick seems sane, so Lois checks him out of the asylum to live with the Griffins. Peter, urged to lose weight by his doctor, starts a society for the acceptance of fat men. When a fat man is strangled in Quahog, Peter and his fat society live in terror, and fingers point to Patrick.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Animated comedy series about family life. Lois runs into an old male friend from school and they renew their friendship, but Peter's jealousy forces a trial separation. Meanwhile, Brian and Stewie get themselves stuck together with industrial-strength glue.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated adventures of a hapless CIA agent and his family. Francine visits her parents since Stan does not appear to appreciate her presence. Meanwhile, Roger has plans to invite college co-eds over for a party during the spring break holiday.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated adventures of a CIA agent and his family. Meanwhile, Roger plays psychiatrist to help them work through their issues.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. A cycle road race reaches its thrilling finale as Greg Eddon overtakes teammate Mitch McCordell to win, but Team DJM owner Des McCordell is annoyed that Greg disobeyed his team orders and rival team manager Reece Dexter is bitterly disappointed that his team lost. As Greg warms down, an unseen assailant throws him from his bike and moves in for the kill... When news comes of the murder, DS Nelson explains the situation to DCI Barnaby while race official Damien Lamerat and local organiser Mary Appleton offer their cooperation and Des outlines the stakes when he tells Barnaby that this race is a make-or-break event for the cyclists. As Barnaby and Nelson investigate, they find themselves drawn into a ruthlessly competitive world of blackmail, bribery and bloodshed where winning comes at any cost.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Challis Court appears to be a serene retirement community for former police officers, but decades-old resentments still fester beneath the surface. When a resident is found murdered inside the gated estate, DCI John Barnaby and DS Jamie Winter realise the killer is likely one of their own - an ex-cop. To crack the case, the duo must reopen the files on the legendary Goldman-Forbes heist from 30 years ago, a robbery that ruined reputations and left a long shadow. With several officers from the original investigation now living at Challis, Barnaby discovers that £300,000 remains motive enough for murder.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When a petty criminal makes a deathbed confession about murdering a teenage girl, DS Ronnie Brooks has to re-open a 14-year-old case he was involved in during his drinking days. Now sober, Ronnie is shaken to the core when he has to revisit the case, which he thought he had put to bed a long time ago - not least when he is forced to question the conclusions he drew when his mind was clouded by alcohol. Did he make a serious error when he accused the girl's businessman father of her murder, or are the team wrong to believe the dying words of a drug addict? Ronnie finds himself torn between his former partner's unwavering belief that they got the right man and the mounting doubts of his current colleagues. He also begins to wonder if there may be other ghosts from his past addiction coming back to haunt him.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: The team starts to investigate after an elderly janitor is found murdered in his home, but the crime has been carried out with such precision and planning that the only evidence the killer leaves is designed to lead the detectives down a series of false trails. Could such masterminding be the work of someone not in control of their own actions? The defence argues that it could - but an altogether more sinister truth is uncovered by prosecutors Jake and Alesha.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Police drama series. A 20-year-old missing persons case is reopened when the remains of a teenage girl are finally found - with the mother desperate to discover the truth about her daughter's disappearance, Frost attempts to get to the bottom of a case that has spanned two decades.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Brandon Monkford proudly introduces artist Lance Auden at the launch of his new sculpture park - the guests head into the floodlit woods and Clemmy Staples is spooked by her boyfriend Brin Dunne before discovering Brandon's body arranged on Lance's centrepiece sculpture. Kam finds a broken locket near the body at the murder scene before Barnaby speaks with the family - Brandon's wife Alexandra is shocked, but son Fabian explains that the villagers were opposed to the park and that Brin had formed a group called VASP (Villagers Against the Sculpture Park). After the family deny recognising the locket, Lance claims he got on well with Brandon but fellow artist Simeon Rowling suggests that Brandon upset some artists and critic Daniel Fargo reveals Brandon received hate mail. As Barnaby and Nelson investigate, they have to get creative if they are to crack a case where art imitates death and everything has a deeper meaning.

To solve the case, Vera must ultimately retrace Warnock's final steps to uncover the truth behind a web of lies spanning 25 years.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: An enquiry is launched when the shocking murder of a teenage girl is shown in an online video. Despite the grainy footage and the lack of a body, the girl and her attackers are identified. But a vow of silence between the defendants and no further evidence means that Jake and Alesha struggle to assemble a strong case. One key witness could turn that all around - but not without the most personal of sacrifices.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: On one long gruelling day, the team work flat-out on three separate cases. The day starts early for Ronnie and Sam as they are called to a murder scene in the early hours. Later, they take a 999 call when a sibling dispute turns murderous. Then a frantic morning takes another turn when an allegation of police intimidation is made against one of the team. The day is no less busy in court for crown prosecutors Jake and Alesha. Their case goes in an unexpected direction when a defendant claims to have made a false confession while under pressure from a police officer. The team have until the end of the day to prove the allegation is untrue.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a curmudgeonly country doctor and his patients in Cornwall. Louisa and Martin have their first therapy session together, but neither of them expects to be given homework - meanwhile, Louisa is surprised when Martin agrees to let schoolboy Peter Cronk do work experience at the surgery, but Morwenna is not quite so happy about it when Peter starts trying to boss her around. Elsewhere, Mrs Tishell is surprised by the return of her husband Clive - and even more so when he tells her he wants to give things another go - Bert has nowhere to live except his new camper van after losing the restaurant, and Louisa has to call Martin to help her when one of her pupils collapses during a school excursion.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a curmudgeonly country doctor and his patients in Cornwall. When Martin reaches breaking point after being followed around by stray dog Buddy, Louisa and Morwenna persuade him to find a new home for the dog with local vet Angela Sim - however, Martin is not impressed by Angela's alternative approaches to medicine... even if it is of the veterinary kind. Meanwhile, Ruth finds out that Bert has been trying to make his own whisky - but he eventually persuades her to keep his secret - and Louisa and Martin's therapy homework results in a picnic to Martin's dismay... however, even this does not go to plan when they are interrupted by Angela and Buddy on the beach.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Murder strikes close to home when a police forensics lab technician is stabbed to death in her home. While Sam and Ronnie pursue their prime suspect, another victim is attacked in what looks to be an identical crime. However, the second victim survives and is able to identify her assailant. Then things get complicated when she and Sam fall for each other. Sam's indiscretion means that what should be a straightforward case for Jake and Alesha becomes anything but. Sam is willing to put his feelings aside for justice, but will it be enough to save his career?

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Crime drama series about the police who investigate crime, and the Crown Prosecution Service who prosecute the offenders. A suicidal man kills several people when he causes a catastrophic train crash. DS Sam Casey struggles to cope after one of the young victims dies in his arms, forcing new DI Wes Leyton and DS Ronnie Brooks to keep a close eye on him. Jake Thorn is not happy when Henry Sharpe introduces him to Alesha's replacement, but before he has time to protest the team receive some shocking news.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: The second part of a two-part story which closes the book on this long-running series. The past is catching up with Frost in more ways than one as a series of copycat crimes convinces Superintendent Mullett that his veteran DI's life is in danger - there are now two killers to bring to justice, but that will not happen until tragedy strikes.

programme.title: Dempsey & Makepeace
programme.desc: The very first episode of the classic detective series. New York police lieutenant James Dempsey kills his corrupt partner Joey and has to lay low until the case can be further investigated - his superior O'Grady sends Dempsey to London in England as part of an exchange of officers. Chief Superintendent Spikings, the head of SI-10, is not too pleased to have a Yank forced onto his department, so he decides to couple Dempsey with his complete opposite in the form of Sergeant Harriet 'Harry' Makepeace - an upper-class English rose - on a case involving a mysterious shipment of caviar.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Ken's diplomatic skills are put to the test when two brothers inherit equal shares in a classic car and the parents of a university student studying art.

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: Fantasy espionage series. The Champions are enlisted to help when a mysterious plane destroys a US naval aircraft.

programme.title: Minder

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: US documentary series set in the world of salvage. When Danielle accompanies Mike on a pick while Frank looks after the shop, the first-time picker strikes gold when she spots a derelict hotel filled with treasure.

programme.title: The Grand Fishing Adventure
programme.desc: Ali Hamidi and Bobby Zamora begin a bucket list fishing tour of Britain in Shropshire - their first mission is to catch a specimen crucian of over two pounds before they head to a top syndicate water called The Avenue, where the carp can weigh over an incredible 60 pounds. As they set themselves the crazy mission of both beating their current UK carp personal bests (PBs), Ali also calls in a favour from two Michelin-starred chef and carp angler Daniel Clifford to teach Zamo how to cook on the bank to stop him moaning...

programme.title: Beat the Chasers
programme.desc: Can a celebrity take on and defeat the greatest quiz team in the world? Bradley Walsh hosts as comedian Russell Kane, This Morning's Dr Zoe Williams, broadcaster Kaye Adams, journalist and presenter Matt Allwright and writer and broadcaster Gyles Brandreth take on the Chasers in a bid to win big money for their chosen charities.

programme.title: Bullseye
programme.desc: Freddie Flintoff hosts the classic darts-based game show as he is joined by three pairs of contestants each made up of a keen darts player (the 'thrower') and their partner (the 'knower') - the teams compete against each other by combining their skills at throwing darts at different game boards while answering questions correctly for points and prizes under the watchful eye of official scorer 'Little' Richard Ashdown. All the classic Bullseye rounds are back, including the Category Board, Pounds for Points and Bully's Prize Board, and the winning team will have a big decision to make at the end of the show - to risk everything they've won so far to try to win Bully's Mystery Star Prize. Also joining the fun is Queen of the Palace Fallon Sherrock, who partners with Freddie to try to complete a charity challenge.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: When a Haul Road legend dies, Ray leads the trucker's son to scatter his ashes on Atigun. But the son's blunders on the Dalton could get them killed before they make it. Lisa gets her biggest break yet when she's assigned to push-truck a monster load to Prudhoe. Alex discovers Alaskan gold, but is later busted by the DOT for violations.

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson returns to the host's chair as Stephen Fry and Jeanette Kwakye take to the hot seat, but have either got what it takes to top the money ladder and win one million pounds for their chosen charity?

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: The show for motorcycle enthusiasts returns with regular presenter and biking fanatic Henry Cole joining the White Helmets display team to jump through a wall of fire, sampling the delights of Enduro riding, travelling to the classic bike show in Stafford and beginning to customise a bike to enter into the Brighton Custom Show.

programme.title: Berlin Station
programme.desc: Daniel and Hector are being hunted by Vassily Krik. They manage to find shelter in a green house in the woods where a well-kept secret will be revealed...

programme.title: Magnum P.I.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Higgins sends an anonymous love letter to an English duchess who is visiting Hawaii, but she jumps to the conclusion that Thomas is the true author and congratulates herself on having attracted such a handsome suitor.

programme.desc: The final episode of the long-running comedy-drama series. Arthur feels the barrel of a gun against his head when he is held captive in his own lock-up by a prisoner on the run.

programme.desc: Drama series about CS Forester's famous seafaring hero. programme.title: Ice Road Truckers - Deadliest Roads

programme.title: Mohamed Salah, el faraón moderno de Anfield
programme.desc: Desde las orillas del Nilo hasta las gradas del mítico Anfield, Mohamed Salah ha tejido una historia de esfuerzo, talento y humildad. Su velocidad letal, su precisión y su sonrisa serena lo han convertido en un símbolo del Liverpool y del fútbol mundial.

programme.title: Premier League
programme.desc: Máxima competitividad, respeto a la tradición, muchos de los mejores jugadores del planeta sobre el césped y ambientazo en las gradas de todos los estadios. Es la Premier League, el torneo de la regularidad del fútbol inglés. El Liverpool defiende corona.

programme.title: Once cromos
programme.desc: Serie en la que se crean los mejores XI de la historia de cada una de las selecciones más importantes. Debate con 4 opciones por puesto y elección de cada jugador. 11 minidebates con clips virales en redes sociales.

programme.title: MotoGP - GP de Hungría
programme.desc: El circuito de Balaton Park acoge la 8ª cita del campeonato. Sus siete curvas a la derecha y diez a la izquierda conforman un trazado único para máquinas y pilotos.

programme.title: Código MotoGP
programme.desc: Código MotoGP es un programa en el que Natacha Alfageme descubre todos los secretos de los Grandes Premios de MotoGP desde un punto de vista diferente y con imágenes en exclusiva.

programme.title: Inside Ducati
programme.desc: Programa que ofrece una visión entre bastidores del equipo Ducati Lenovo en la temporada de MotoGP.

programme.title: Premier League
programme.desc: Liverpool y Manchester City se miden con Anfiled con los Reds intentando meterse en puestos Champions, y los de Guardiola continuar peleando por el título de la Premier.

programme.title: Premier Corner by Guiness 0,0
programme.desc: Guardiola es uno de los entrenadores más reconocidos de la Premier League. En ''Premier Corner'', con Eneko Fernández, charlamos con el técnico catalán.

programme.title: Titan World Series 2025: El propósito
programme.desc: Conoce a Marti y Jan Alvares, quiénes junto a los atletas Konny Looser, Alejandra Lizana, Daniel Fornós y Michal Kamermeier se embarcan en un apasionante reto a través del peligroso desierto marroquí, la Titan World Series.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Setelah menyerap Chi, Pahlawan mistis, dari Empat Rasi Bintang, empat anak panda meminta Master Naga untuk mengajari mereka Kung Fu.

programme.title: Classic Cartoon
programme.desc: Classic Cartoon adalah serial kartun anak - anak yang di dalamnya terdapat serial kartun Casper dan teman - temannya.

programme.title: Abominable And The Invisible City
programme.desc: Serial Animasi yang melanjutkan kisah petualangan Yi Jin dan Peng dari film 'Abominable'. Mereka sekarang harus melindungi makhluk ajaib bernama Everest dan dunia tak kasat mata dari orang orang yang ingin mengeksploitasinya.

programme.title: Kring Kring Ada Cerita
programme.desc: Sebuah Program yang berisikan pesan kebaikan yang disampaikan melalui dongeng, lagu dan drama singkat yang dibawakan oleh anak - anak.

programme.title: Si Unyil
programme.desc: Serial kartun produksi anak negeri yang telah dibuat ulang agar lebih menarik.

programme.title: Balita
programme.desc: Lagu Anak Indonesia BaLiTa menyajikan animasi lagu anak Indonesia yang lucu, video belajar membaca alfabet, berhitung dan menyanyi ditemani oleh trio Baba Lili Tata.

programme.title: Laskar Pelangi 2
programme.desc: Ikal dan Arai menjalani hari-hari menimba ilmu di Sorbonne. Ikal mengambil master ekonomi sementara Arai berkutat dengan ilmu biologi. Di antara harapan ayah Ikal yang menghendaki mereka menjadi ahli pupuk dan apoteker.

programme.title: Kiko S3
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang keinginan Occi untuk bisa seperti Bulk Boggard yang kuat. Kiko pun berusaha membantu gurita kesayangannya tersebut agar bisa mewujudkan impiannya.

programme.title: Ricis The Adventure
programme.desc: Ricis bersama timnya menemukan ponsel misterius dan tersedot ke layar ponsel. Ternyata mereka diseret ke portal yang mengirim mereka ke Socidia City, kota metaverse tempat semua aktivitas jejaring sosial di dunia nyata.

programme.title: Dragons
programme.desc: Menceritakan seorang Putra seorang ketua Viking berteman dengan musuh mereka, seekor naga. Kisah ini berfokus pada kejadian terjadi di desa Berk Viking, di mana peternakan penduduk setempat kerap dicuri & diserang oleh seekor naga

programme.title: Little Charmers
programme.desc: Di tanah ajaib Charmville, Charmer-in-training Hazel dan sahabatnya, Posie dan Lavender, masih terbiasa dengan kekuatan mereka. Hazel yang tak kenal takut, memimpin kelompok dalam petualangan yang dirancang kemampuan magis mereka.

programme.title: Menggapai Mimpi
programme.desc: Program features tentang anak - anak sekolah yang berjuang dalam menggapai mimpi. Baik dalam dunia pendidikan formal maupun non formal mereka yang tetap semangat dalam meraih cita - citanya.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Berlatar 1.300 tahun setelah How to Train Your Dragon, dimana naga telah lama dianggap sebagai legenda. Ceritanya berpusat pada sekelompok remaja yang menemukan celah di Bumi akibat komet yang membuka dunia bawah tanah penuh naga

programme.title: Bermain & Bergembira
programme.desc: Bermain & Bergembira bersama anak-anak aktif, cerdas dan kreatif.

programme.title: Balita
programme.desc: Lagu Anak Indonesia BaLiTa menyajikan animasi lagu anak Indonesia yang lucu, video belajar membaca alfabet, berhitung dan menyanyi ditemani oleh trio Baba Lili Tata.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Setelah menyerap Chi, Pahlawan mistis, dari Empat Rasi Bintang, empat anak panda meminta Master Naga untuk mengajari mereka Kung Fu.

programme.title: Agent Binky
programme.desc: Serial ini mengikuti petualangan Binky, seekor kucing rumah muda yang hitam dan putih, setelah Dia menjadi kucing luar angkasa, sedang dalam misi untuk melindungi keluarga manusia dari ancaman antar bintang.

programme.title: Hi Kiddos

programme.title: Cbeebies
programme.desc: Menghadirkan tayangan favorit Go Jetters & Hey Duggee yang seru dan edukatif dari Cbeebies.Bersama Go Jetters, berpetualang keliling dunia mengenal berbagai tempat ikonik serta pentingnya menjaga lingkungan yang menyenangkan.

programme.desc: Program features tentang anak - anak sekolah yang berjuang dalam menggapai mimpi. Baik dalam dunia pendidikan formal maupun non formal mereka yang tetap semangat dalam meraih cita - citanya.

programme.title: Main Yuk !
programme.desc: Program yang dirancang untuk membantu anak-anak mempelajari dasar-dasar pengetahuan dan keterampilan melalui visual, gerakan, suara, dan storytelling yang disajikan secara ringan, menyenangkan, edukatif, interaktif & penuh warna.

programme.title: Cbeebies
programme.desc: Menghadirkan tayangan favorit Go Jetters & Hey Duggee yang seru dan edukatif dari Cbeebies.Bersama Go Jetters, berpetualang keliling dunia mengenal berbagai tempat ikonik serta pentingnya menjaga lingkungan yang menyenangkan.

programme.title: Kartu Pos Wini
programme.desc: Ruth berhasil memenuhi salah satu obsesinya bekerja di Kantor Pos. Dia juga menjadi relawan yang mendampingi pasien kanker anak bernama Wini Edenia. Suatu hari, Wini ingin mengirimkan kartu pos untuk Tuhan yang beralamat surga.

programme.title: Cerita Sebelum Tidur
programme.desc: Program pengantar tidur anak yang menghadirkan cerita menarik melalui bayangan tangan. Dengan lampu kecil, bayangan membentuk karakter yang disukai anak-anak.

programme.title: Hi Kiddos
programme.desc: Hi Kiddos adalah sebuah program edukasi untuk anak yang menyajikan video bertema ilmu pengetahuan dan belajar sambil menjelajahi tempat-tempat menarik.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Berlatar 1.300 tahun setelah How to Train Your Dragon, dimana naga telah lama dianggap sebagai legenda. Ceritanya berpusat pada sekelompok remaja yang menemukan celah di Bumi akibat komet yang membuka dunia bawah tanah penuh naga

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Setelah menyerap Chi, Pahlawan mistis, dari Empat Rasi Bintang, empat anak panda meminta Master Naga untuk mengajari mereka Kung Fu.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Setelah menyerap Chi, Pahlawan mistis, dari Empat Rasi Bintang, empat anak panda meminta Master Naga untuk mengajari mereka Kung Fu.

programme.title: Madam Rose
programme.desc: Keira seorang gadis lugu yang terpaksa berjuang melawan dunia hitam dan menjadi pengedar narkoba, demi membiayai hidup Ibu dan Adiknya serta adanya niat membalas dendam kepada seseorang.

programme.title: Horror Banget
programme.desc: Cak Lontong dan anak indigo Naomi Angelia Sea akan membahas dan membedah hal-hal horor dengan tema-tema yang seru. Kita akan buktikan bersama apakah itu nyata atau hanya gosip saja.

programme.title: Eyang Putri
programme.desc: Tragedi aneh terjadi di rumah EYANG SRI, bahkan Gendis, cucu Eyang mendapati sebuah teror klenik diluar nalar yang mengancam nyawa mereka.

programme.title: Waktunya Srimulat Bercyanda
programme.desc: Program Sitkom dengan Srimulat, group lawak terbesar dan terpopuler serta memiliki penggemar dari berbagai kalangan masyarakat yang menampilkan kisah-kisah lucu dan sedang menjadi topik hangat.

programme.title: Bisik Hati Lara
programme.desc: LARA sebagai anak sulung, tak punya pilihan selain harus mencari pekerjaan tambahan, demi adik satu- satunya, LENA, bisa melanjutkan SMA nya sampai lulus, sembari memastikan terapi pengobatan Ibu.

programme.title: Brata S2
programme.desc: Pembunuhan brutal terjadi di ATM kampung Sukadamai. Roni harus memimpin penyelidikan karena Brata dipindahkan ke bagian arsip. Sukadamai membawa Brata kembali ke mimpi buruk di masa lalu.

programme.title: Angling Dharma S1
programme.desc: Pertarungan Angling Dharma dan Syudawirat menyebabkan Angling Dharma terluka parah. Angling Dharma terpaksa meninggalkan Malwapati beserta para pengikutnya.

programme.title: Trip Among Rans
programme.desc: Pergi berlibur ditengah masa PSBB membuat Raffi dan nagita menjadi super heboh dalam mempersiapkan segala kebutuhan liburannya demi mendapatkan liburan yang aman dan tetap nyaman

programme.title: Negeri 5 Menara
programme.desc: Negeri 5 Menara series bercerita tentang Alif, pemuda minangkabau memiliki cita-cita tinggi. Ia ingin sekolah di ITB & menjadi sosok seperti idolanya, B.J. Habibie. Sayangnya keinginan Alif tidak mendapat respon baik dari ibunya.

programme.title: Love Daddy
programme.desc: Perjuangan 3 orang ayah dalam mengasuh anak remajanya. Meski memiliki pola asuh yang berbeda, namun mereka memiliki satu kesamaan: rasa sayang dan kekhawatiran yang berlebihan terhadap anak-anaknya.

programme.title: Si Doel The Movie
programme.desc: 14 tahun sudah Sarah pergi tanpa kabar & perpisahan tidak jelas. Rindu tersimpan dalam hati Doel sudah berumah tangga dengan Zaenab. Melalui Hans, Sarah meminta Doel datang ke Amsterdam bertemu dengan Dul, anak hasil pernikahannya

programme.title: Clbk The Series
programme.desc: Mini series yang menceritakan suka dan duka mencari pasangan melalui kencan buta.

programme.title: Mr Bean Animation
programme.desc: Mr. Bean laki-laki yang mempunyai sikap sedikit kekanak-kanakan yang berusaha bertahan hidup di kota London dan sangat kompetititf. Dalam series animasi, ia digambarkan lebih beruntung dan kompeten dari versi live actionya.

programme.title: Apose
programme.desc: Serial komedi Apose adalah kepanjangan dari Anak Podcast Sejati. Drama ini akan mengisahkan tentang pekerjaan podcaster di Indonesia termasuk bagaimana pekerjaan seorang podcaster di balik layar.

programme.title: Tiba - Tiba Berondong
programme.desc: Bella, dosen psikologi 35 tahun yang mapan namun kesepian. Di dorong dengan tekanan keluarga, ia menggunakan aplikasi kencan & bertemu Langit, pria jenaka ternyata baru 19 tahun dan menjadi mahasiswa barunya, memicu dilema asmara.

programme.title: Brata S2
programme.desc: Pembunuhan brutal terjadi di ATM kampung Sukadamai. Roni harus memimpin penyelidikan karena Brata dipindahkan ke bagian arsip. Sukadamai membawa Brata kembali ke mimpi buruk di masa lalu.

programme.title: Clbk The Series
programme.desc: Mini series yang menceritakan suka dan duka mencari pasangan melalui kencan buta.

programme.title: Angling Dharma S2
programme.desc: Perpecahan terjadi ketika Kerajaan Malwapati yang dipimpin oleh Prabu Angling Dharma disulut oleh perseteruan dengan Syudawirat untuk memperebutkan.

programme.title: Airmata Terakhir Bunda
programme.desc: Bencana yang menghampiri Sriyani bukan hanya lumpur Lapindo, tapi juga suami yang melarikan diri kepada wanita lain tanpa memberi kejelasan status. Akibatnya, kemiskinan membuat Sriyani harus memenuhi kebutuhannya sehari-hari.

programme.title: Dapil Komeng
programme.desc: Sketsa Komedi yang menceritakan kelucuan Komeng dalam mewujudkan mimpinya dengan cara masuk ke lemari rahasia yang akan membawanya kemana saja dan bertemu siapa saja yang dia inginkan

programme.title: Princess And The Boss
programme.desc: Demi menjadi beauty influencer sukses, keira membuat video kritik untuk lini kosmetik ""beaucity"". Sayangnya, video itu berdampak buruk pada hubungan bisnis ayahnya, sehingga keira harus memperbaikinya.

programme.title: Ikhlas Paling Serius
programme.desc: Drama romantis yang mengikuti Fajar, seorang people pleaser yang menjadi asisten pribadi Farah, CEO perfeksionis. Fajar terjebak dilema saat ditugaskan memata-matai Farah, namun justru jatuh cinta dan terlibat konflik rumit.

programme.title: Negeri 5 Menara
programme.desc: Negeri 5 Menara series bercerita tentang Alif, pemuda minangkabau memiliki cita-cita tinggi. Ia ingin sekolah di ITB & menjadi sosok seperti idolanya, B.J. Habibie. Sayangnya keinginan Alif tidak mendapat respon baik dari ibunya.

programme.title: Isyarat
programme.desc: Angkie dilahirkan sebagai gadis yang cantik dan normal. Namun, pada usia 10 tahun tiba-tiba pendengarannya berkurang secara drastis. Dokter memvonisnya kehilangan pendengaran selamanya.

programme.title: Montase
programme.desc: Program magazine tentang movie & series review, menghadirkan para cast dan mengkombinasikan game show

programme.title: Ikatan Cinta
programme.desc: Berkisah tentang 2 bersaudara Andin dan Elsa yang tanpa sengaja mencintai pria yang sama yaitu Nino. Hubungan mereka berdua yang memang tidak pernah baik menjadi semakin buruk setelah Nino menikah dengan Andin.

programme.title: Bukannya Aku Tidak Mau Nikah
programme.desc: Khadija tak sengaja terpotret oleh Nicholas Van Dijk. Setelah mengenal lebih dekat, Nico jatuh hati pada gadis itu, namun Khadija memilih menjauh ketika muncul Mala yang mengaku menyukai Nico

programme.title: Mr Bean Animation
programme.desc: Mr. Bean laki-laki yang mempunyai sikap sedikit kekanak-kanakan yang berusaha bertahan hidup di kota London dan sangat kompetititf. Dalam series animasi, ia digambarkan lebih beruntung dan kompeten dari versi live actionya.

programme.title: Tiba - Tiba Berondong
programme.desc: Bella, dosen psikologi 35 tahun yang mapan namun kesepian. Di dorong dengan tekanan keluarga, ia menggunakan aplikasi kencan & bertemu Langit, pria jenaka ternyata baru 19 tahun dan menjadi mahasiswa barunya, memicu dilema asmara.

programme.title: Trip Among Rans
programme.desc: Pergi berlibur ditengah masa PSBB membuat Raffi dan nagita menjadi super heboh dalam mempersiapkan segala kebutuhan liburannya demi mendapatkan liburan yang aman dan tetap nyaman

programme.title: Ckckck
programme.desc: Menjelajahi kompleksitas hubungan modern dengan perpaduan drama dan komedi. Dimana situasi itu membuat orang bereaksi ck.ck.ck.

programme.title: Madam Rose
programme.desc: Keira seorang gadis lugu yang terpaksa berjuang melawan dunia hitam dan menjadi pengedar narkoba, demi membiayai hidup Ibu dan Adiknya serta adanya niat membalas dendam kepada seseorang.

programme.title: Madam Rose
programme.desc: Keira seorang gadis lugu yang terpaksa berjuang melawan dunia hitam dan menjadi pengedar narkoba, demi membiayai hidup Ibu dan Adiknya serta adanya niat membalas dendam kepada seseorang.

programme.title: MD Series: Ipar adalah Maut the Series
MD Series: Ipar adalah Maut the Series
MD Series: Ipar adalah Maut the Series
Modern Times
मॉडर्न टाइम्स
மாடர்ன் டைம்ஸ்
మోడరన్ టైమ్స్
मॉडर्न टाईम्स
programme.desc: A factory production line worker is thrown out on the street for his manic behaviour. He then meets a young, homeless girl, who is recently orphaned, and tries to build a home with her.
अपने व्यवहार के कारण एक फैक्ट्री प्रोडक्शन लाइन से निकाले गए एक वर्कर की मुलाकात, एक अनाथ युवा बेघर लड़की से होती है जिसके साथ वह घर बनाने की कोशिश करता है।
ஒரு தொழிற்சாலை உற்பத்தித் தொழிலாளி அனாதையான ஒரு இளம், வீடற்ற பெண்ணைச் சந்தித்து, அவளுடன் ஒரு வீடு கட்ட முயற்சிக்கிறார்.
ఉద్యోగం నుండి తొలగించబడిన ఒక ఫ్యాక్టరీ కార్మికుడు ఒక నిరాశ్రయురాలైన అమ్మాయితో ఇల్లు కట్టుకోవడానికి ప్రయత్నిస్తాడు.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 2
द हंगर गेम्स: मॉकिंगजे, पार्ट 2
தி ஹங்கர் கேம்ஸ்: மாக்கிங்ஜே, பார்ட் 2
ది హంగర్ గేమ్స్: మోకింగ్‌జయ్, పార్ట్ 2
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen realises that she is no longer fighting for survival. So, she sets out to assassinate the tyrannical President Snow and liberate the people of Panem.
कैटनीस एवरडीन को एहसास होता है कि अब वह ज़िंदा रहने के लिए नहीं लड़ रही है। इसलिए, वह अत्याचारी राष्ट्रपति स्नो की हत्या करके पैनम के लोगों को आज़ाद कराने की ठान लेती है।
உயிர்வாழ்வதற்காக போராடவில்லை என்பதை கட்னிஸ், ஜனாதிபதி ஸ்னோவை படுகொலை செய்து பனேம் மக்களை விடுவிக்க முடிவெடுக்கிறார்.
కాట్నిస్ ఎవర్‌డీన్, నిరంకుశ అధ్యక్షుడు స్నోను హత్య చేసి, పనేమ్ ప్రజలను విముక్తి చేయడానికి బయలుదేరుతుంది.

programme.title: The Kid
द किड
தி கிட்
ద కిడ్
द कीड
programme.desc: After a woman abandons her child, the Tramp finds him and takes him under his wing. As the boy grows up, the Tramp and the boy try to cope with life's trials and tribulations.
एक महिला द्वारा अपने बच्चे को छोड़ दिए जाने के बाद, ट्रम्प उसे ढूँढ़ता है और अपने संरक्षण में ले लेता है। जैसे-जैसे लड़का बड़ा होता है, ट्रम्प और लड़का जीवन की कठिनाइयों से निपटने की कोशिश करते हैं।
கைவிடபட்ட ஒரு குழந்தையை நாடோடி வளர்க்கையில், வாழ்வில் பின்னர் இருவரும் சோதனைகள்-இன்னல்களை சமாளிக்க முயலுக்கிறார்கள்.
ఒక స్త్రీ తన బిడ్డను విడిచిపెట్టిన తర్వాత, ట్రాంప్ అతనిని చూసుకుంటాడు. బాలుడు పెరిగేకొద్దీ వారు పరీక్షలను ఎదుర్కొంటారు.

programme.title: Tom & Jerry
टॉम एण्ड जेरी
டாம் அண்ட் ஜெர்ரி
టామ్ అండ్ జెర్రీ
टॉम अ‍ॅन्ड जेरी
programme.desc: Jerry, a mischievous mouse, takes refuge in a fancy hotel that is set to host a wedding. In order to get rid of him, one of the event planners hires Jerry's feline rival, Tom.
एक शरारती चूहा जैरी, एक आलीशान होटल में शरण लेता है जहाँ एक शादी होने वाली है। उससे छुटकारा पाने के लिए, इवेंट प्लानर में से एक जैरी के बिल्ली के समान प्रतिद्वंद्वी टॉम को काम पर रखता है।
திருமணம் நடக்கவுள்ள ஆடம்பர ஹோட்டலில் தங்கும் குறும்புக்கார ஜெர்ரியை விரட்ட அதன் எதிரியான டாமை அழைக்கும் பணியாளர்.
వివాహం జరగనున్న ఒక హోటల్ లో చేరిన జెర్రీని వదిలించుకోడానికి ఈవెంట్ ప్లానర్‌లలో ఒకరు దాని ప్రత్యర్థి టామ్‌ని నియమిస్తాడు.

programme.title: Piranha 3DD
पिरान्हा 3डी
பிரானா 3டி‌டி
పిరాన్హా 3డిడి
programme.desc: The bloodthirsty piranhas head towards a local water park. Amidst the fun-seeking horde at the park are friends Maddy, Barry and Kyle who decide to take on the man-eating creatures.
खून के प्यासे पिरान्हा एक स्थानीय वाटर पार्क की ओर बढ़ते हैं। पार्क में मौज-मस्ती की तलाश में जुटी भीड़ के बीच दोस्त मैडी, बैरी और काइल, आदमखोर जीवों से लड़ने का फैसला करते हैं।
ஒரு நீர் பூங்கா நோக்கி செல்லும் தீய பிரன்ஹாக்களை தடுக்க முயலும் அங்கு வேடிக்கை-தேடும் மேடி, பாரி மற்றும் கைல்.
ముగ్గురు స్నేహితులు మ్యాడీ, బారీ, కైల్‌లు స్థానిక వాటర్ పార్క్ వైపు వస్తున్న రక్తపిపాసి పిరాన్హాలను చంపాలనుకుంటారు.

programme.title: The Lost City
द लॉस्ट सिटी
தி லாஸ்ட் சிட்டி
ది లాస్ట్ సిటీ
द लॉस्ट सिटी
programme.desc: Loretta Sage, a novelist, faces real-life peril when abducted by a billionaire.
जहां लोरेटा सेज के उपन्यास प्राचीन मकबरों और साहसिक कारनामों से भरे होते हैं। वहीं एक सनकी अरबपति के एक पौराणिक खोए हुए शहर का पता लगाने के लिए उनका अपहरण कर लिया जाता है।
ஒரு புகழ்பெற்ற தொலைந்து போன நகரத்தைக் கண்டுபிடிக்க சாகச நாவலாசிரியர் லோரெட்டா சேஜ் ஒரு கோடீஸ்வரரால் கடத்தப்படுகிறார்.
లోరెట్టా సేజ్ నవలలు పురాతన సమాధులు,సాహసోపేతమైన సాహసాలతో నిండి ఉన్నాయి,కానీ ఆమె నిజ జీవితంలో వాటికి సిద్ధంగా ఉందని కాదు.

programme.title: Wonder Woman 1984
वंडर वुमन 1984
வண்டர் வுமன் 1984
వండర్ ఉమెన్ 1984
programme.desc: Wonder Woman battles Maxwell Lord, an evil businessman, and Barbara Minerva, her friend-turned-foe, who wreak havoc on the world through a wish-granting artefact.
वंडर वुमन, दुष्ट व्यवसायी मैक्सवेल लोरेंज़ानो और अपनी मित्र से शत्रु बनी बारबरा मिनर्वा से लड़ती है, जो इच्छा पूरी करने वाली एक जादुई वस्तु के माध्यम से दुनिया में तबाही मचाते हैं।
ஒரு தொழில்முனைவோரான மேக்ஸ்வெல் மற்றும் எதிரியாக மாறிய நண்பரான பார்பராவுடன் மோதுகையில் தன் காதலனுடன் சேரும் வண்டர் வுமன்.
వండర్ ఉమెన్ దుర్మార్గుడైన మాక్స్‌వెల్, కోరికలు తీర్చే మంత్రం దండంతో ప్రపంచాన్ని సనాశనం చేసే బార్బరాతో పోరాడుతుంది.

programme.title: Baby Driver
பேபி ட்ரைவர்
బేబీ డ్రైవర్
programme.desc: When talented getaway driver Baby meets his dream girl, Debora, he chooses to leave his shady life behind. But when he is called in for one last heist with an unstable crew, things get dicey.
டெபோராவை சந்தித்து நிழலலுக வாழ்வை நீங்க முயன்ற திறமையான டிரைவர் பேபி, கடைசியாக ஒரு திருட்டுக்கு அழைக்கப்படுகின்றார்.
డెబోరాను కలిసిన తర్వాత తన చీకటి జీవితం విడిచిపెట్టాలనుకునే డ్రైవర్ బేబీ అస్థిర సిబ్బందితో చివరి దోపిడీకి పిలువబడతాడు.

programme.title: Johnny English Strikes Again
जॉनी इंग्लिश स्ट्राइक्स अगेन
ஜானி இங்க்லீஷ் ஸ்ட்ரைக்ஸ் அகேன்
జానీ ఇంగ్లీష్ స్ట్రైక్స్ ఎగైన్
programme.desc: When a hacker reveals the identities of Britain's undercover agents, British agent Johnny English springs back into action and must overcome the challenges of modern technology.
जब एक हैकर ब्रिटेन के अंडरकवर एजेंटों की पहचान उजागर कर देता है, तो ब्रिटिश एजेंट जॉनी इंग्लिश फिर से एक्शन में आ जाता है और उसे आधुनिक तकनीक की चुनौतियों का सामना करना पड़ता है।
பிரிட்டனிலுள்ள இரகசிய முகவர்களின் அடையாளங்களை வெளிப்படுத்தும் ஹேக்கர் கண்டறிய முயலும் ஜானி, பல சவால்களை கடக்க வேண்டும்.
ప్రభుత్వ సమాచారాన్ని సంగ్రహించి, బ్రిటన్ రహస్య ఏజెంట్ల వివరాలను బయటపెట్టిన హ్యాకర్ ను పట్టుకోవడానికి జానీని నియమిస్తారు.

programme.title: Apocalypto
अपोकैलिप्टो
அபோகேலிப்டோ
అపోకలిప్టో
अपोकॅलिप्टो
programme.desc: A mettlesome tribesman must do whatever it takes to protect himself and his family from a multitude of threats during the Mayan civilisation's waning years.
माया सभ्यता के पतन के वर्षों के दौरान एक साहसी आदिवासी खुद को और अपने परिवार को अनेकों खतरों से बचाने के लिए हर संभव प्रयास करता है।
மாயன் நாகரிகத்தின் அழிவின்போது அச்சுறுத்தல்களிலிருந்து தன்னையும் குடும்பத்தையும் பாதுகாக்க முயலும் ஒரு பழங்குடியினர்.
ఒక గిరిజనుడు మయాన్ నాగరికత అంతరించిపోతున్న కాలంలో ఎదురవుతున్న ముప్పుల నుండి తనని, తన కుటుంబాన్ని కాపాడుకోవాలి.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Kong
गॉडज़िला वर्सेस काँग
காட்ஸில்லா வெர்ஸஸ் காங்
గాడ్జిల్లా వర్సెస్ కాంగ్
programme.desc: King Kong is transported out of his containment zone after Godzilla resurfaces and creates mayhem. Humans need his help to reach Hollow Earth and find a way to subdue the king of the monsters.
गॉडज़िला का आतंक होने के बाद, किंग काँग को उसके नियंत्रण क्षेत्र से बाहर ले जाया जाता है। मनुष्यों को हॉलो अर्थ तक पहुँचने और राक्षसों के राजा को वश में करने का तरीका खोजने में उसकी मदद की ज़रूरत है।
காட்ஜில்லா அழிவு பாதையில் பயணிக்கும்போது, ​​காங்கை நோக்கி திரும்பும் மனிதர்கள்.
గాడ్జిల్లా నగరంలో విధ్వంసం సృష్టించినప్పుడు రాక్షసుల రాజును లొంగదీసుకోవడానికి మానవులు కింగ్ కాంగ్ సహాయాన్ని పొందుతారు.

programme.title: The Nun II
द नन II
தி நன் II
ది నన్ II
द नन II
programme.desc: In 1956 France, Sister Irene faces the terrifying demon Valak, racing against time to save a convent and the surrounding community from evil.
1956 में फ्रांस में, सिस्टर आइरीन को डरावने दानव वलाक का सामना करना पड़ता है, जो एक कॉन्वेंट और आस-पास के समुदाय को बुराई से बचाती है।
1956 ஆம் ஆண்டு பிரான்சில், மடத்தையும் நகரத்தையும் தீமை அச்சுறுத்தும் அதே வேளையில், சகோதரி ஐரீன் வாலக்கை எதிர்கொள்கிறார்.
1956 ఫ్రాన్స్‌లో, సిస్టర్ ఐరీన్ భయంకరమైన వాలక్‌ను ఎదుర్కొంటుంది, సమాజాన్ని చెడు నుండి కాపాడటానికి కాలంతో పోటీపడుతుంది.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight
ट्रांसफॉर्मर्स: द लास्ट नाइट
டிரான்ஸ்ஃபார்மர்ஸ்: தி லாஸ்ட் நைட்
ట్రాన్స్‌ఫార్మర్స్: ది లాస్ట్ నైట్
ट्रान्सफॉर्मर्स: द लास्ट नाईट
programme.desc: Optimus Prime seeks his creator in space. Meanwhile, humans and Autobots join forces to save Earth from an ancient threat.
ऑप्टिमस प्राइम अंतरिक्ष में अपने निर्माता की तलाश में निकलता है। इस बीच, मनुष्य और ऑटोबोट्स पृथ्वी को एक प्राचीन खतरे से बचाने के लिए एकजुट हो जाते हैं।
மனிதர்களும் ஆட்டோபோட்களும் பூமியை காப்பாற்ற முயற்சிக்கும்போது, ​​ஆப்டிமஸ் பிரைம் தனது படைப்பாளரை விண்வெளியில் தேடுகிறது.
మానవులు, ఆటోబాట్‌లు భూమిని ఒక ముప్పు నుండి కాపాడాలనుకోగా, ఆప్టిమస్ ప్రైమ్ అంతరిక్షంలో తన సృష్టికర్త కోసం వెతుకుతాడు.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
टीनेज म्यूटेंट निंजा टर्टल्स
டீன்ஏஜ் ம்யூட்ன்ட் நிஞ்சா டர்டில்ஸ்
టీనేజ్ మ్యూటెంట్ నింజా టర్టల్స్
टीनेज म्युटंट निंजा टर्टल्स
programme.desc: As a powerful crime lord threatens New York City, a team of mutant turtles trained in martial arts tries to leave their hidden lair to defend their beloved home from impending danger.
एक शक्तिशाली अपराध सरदार न्यूयॉर्क शहर को खतरे में डालता है, तब मार्शल आर्ट्स में प्रशिक्षित म्यूटेंट कछुओं की एक टीम अपने प्यारे घर को खतरे से बचाने के लिए छिपे हुए अड्डे को छोड़ने की कोशिश करती है।
நியூயார்க் நகரம் சிக்கலில் இருக்கும்போது, ​​அதை காப்பாற்றுவது நான்கு நிஞ்ஜா சண்டையிடும், சகோதரர்களின் கையில்தான் உள்ளது.
పిజ్జా ప్రియులైన టీనేజ్ మ్యూటెంట్ నింజా తాబేళ్లు ఇబ్బందుల్లో ఉన్న న్యూయార్క్ నగరాన్ని కాపాడడానికి సిద్దమవుతాయి.

programme.title: Constantine
कॉन्स्टनटाइन
கான்ஸ்டன்டைன்
కాన్స్టెంటీన్
कॉन्स्टंटीन
programme.desc: Detective Angela approaches Constantine, an exorcist, to help her investigate her twin sister's death. As he digs deeper, he realises a dark conspiracy which could threaten the world.
जासूस एंजेला अपनी जुड़वां बहन की मौत की जाँच में मदद के लिए एक भूत-प्रेत भगाने वाले कॉन्स्टनटाइन से संपर्क करती है। जाँच करने पर उसे एक गहरी साज़िश का पता चलता है जो दुनिया के लिए ख़तरा बन सकती है।
இரட்டை சகோதரியின் மரணத்தை விசாரிக்க உதவ கான்ஸ்டன்டைனை அணுகும் ஏஞ்செலா, மனித உலகில் பேய்கள் நுழைய முயல்வதை உணர்கிறாள்.
కవల పిల్లల మరణం గురించి దర్యాప్తు చేయడంలో సహాయం చేయడానికి డిటెక్టివ్ ఏంజెలా భూతవైద్యుడు కాన్స్టెంటీన్‌ను సంప్రదిస్తుంది.

programme.title: The Circus
द सर्कस
த சர்கஸ்
ద సర్కస్
द सर्कस
programme.desc: The Tramp is hired by the proprietor of a circus after he stumbles into the middle of a performance and becomes the star attraction. He ends up falling in love with a horse rider.
ट्रम्प को एक सर्कस के मालिक द्वारा काम पर रखा जाता है, जब वह एक प्रदर्शन के बीच में ठोकर खाता है और स्टार आकर्षण बन जाता है। वह एक घुड़सवार से प्यार करने लगता है।
சர்க்கஸில் நிகழ்ச்சியின் நடுவில் வந்து நட்சத்திரமானதால் அங்கு நியமனமாகும் நாடோடி குதிரை ஓட்டுபவளை காதலிக்கிறார்.
పొరపాటున ఒక ప్రదర్శన మధ్యలోకి పరిగెత్తి స్టార్ అట్రాక్షన్‌గా మారిన ట్రాంప్ సర్కస్‌లో ప్రదర్శన ఇవ్వడానికి నియమించబడతాడు.

programme.title: Rush Hour
रश आवर
ரஷ் ஹவர்
రష్ అవర్
रश आवर
programme.desc: Two detectives put their differences aside to save the kidnapped daughter of a diplomat.
हांगकांग के एक जासूस और लॉस एंजिल्स के एक चतुर जासूस, अपने मतभेदों को दूर कर एक चीनी राजनयिक की लापता बेटी को खोजने के लिए मिलकर काम करते हैं।
ஹாங்காங் மற்றும் லாஸ் ஏஞ்சல்ஸில் இருந்து இரண்டு துப்பறிவாளர்கள் ஒரு சீன தூதரின் காணாமல்போன மகளைக் கண்டுபிடிக்க வேண்டும்.
ఒక హాంకాంగ్ డిటెక్టివ్, ఒక లాస్ ఏంజిల్స్ డిటెక్టివ్ కలిసి తప్పిపోయిన చైనీస్ దౌత్యవేత్త కూతురిని కనిపెట్టాలి.

programme.title: The Lego Movie
द लेगो मूवी
த லெகோ மூவி
ది లెగో మూవీ
programme.desc: Emmet, an ordinary individual prophesied to be the Special, is entrusted with the responsibility of saving the Lego world from the cruel ways of Lord Business.
एक साधारण व्यक्ति एम्मेट जिसके बारे में भविष्यवाणी की गई थी कि वह विशेष होगा, उसे लेगो वर्ल्ड को लॉर्ड बिज़नेस के क्रूर तरीकों से बचाने की जिम्मेदारी सौंपी जाती है।
லெகோ உலகத்தை லார்ட் பிசினஸின் கொடூரமான வழிகளில் இருந்து காப்பாற்ற வேண்டிய ஸ்பெஷல் என்று முன்னறிவிக்கப்பட்ட எம்மெட்.
ఒక సాధారణ వ్యక్తి ఎమ్మెట్ కు లార్డ్ బిజినెస్ క్రూరమైన మార్గాల నుండి లెగో ప్రపంచాన్ని రక్షించే బాధ్యతతో అప్పగిస్తారు.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible -- Ghost Protocol
मिशन: इम्पासबल -- घोस्ट प्रोटोकॉल
மிஷன்: இம்பாசிபிள் -- கோஸ்ட் புரோடோகால்
మిషన్: ఇంపాజిబుల్ -- ఘోస్ట్ ప్రోటోకాల్
मिशन: इम्पॉसिबल---घोस्ट प्रोटोकॉल
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt, an expert agent, confronts a worldwide plot. To prevent a nuclear crisis, he collaborates secretly with his team after his organisation is deceived.
एक विशेषज्ञ एजेंट ईथन हंट, एक वैश्विक साजिश का सामना करते हैं। परमाणु संकट को रोकने के लिए, वे अपनी संस्था के साथ धोखा होने के बाद अपनी टीम के साथ गुप्त रूप से सहयोग करते हैं।
உலகளாவிய சதித்திட்டத்தை எதிர்கொள்ளும் ​​ஈதன் ஹன்ட், அணுசக்தி நெருக்கடியை தடுக்க தனது குழுவுடன் இணைந்து செயல்படுகிறார்.
ఏజెంట్ అయిన ఏతన్ హంట్, అణు సంక్షోభాన్ని నివారించడానికి, తన ఏజెన్సీ మోసపోయిన తర్వాత తన బృందంతో రహస్యంగా సహకరిస్తాడు.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight
ट्रांसफॉर्मर्स: द लास्ट नाइट
டிரான்ஸ்ஃபார்மர்ஸ்: தி லாஸ்ட் நைட்
ట్రాన్స్‌ఫార్మర్స్: ది లాస్ట్ నైట్
ट्रान्सफॉर्मर्स: द लास्ट नाईट
programme.desc: Optimus Prime seeks his creator in space. Meanwhile, humans and Autobots join forces to save Earth from an ancient threat.
ऑप्टिमस प्राइम अंतरिक्ष में अपने निर्माता की तलाश में निकलता है। इस बीच, मनुष्य और ऑटोबोट्स पृथ्वी को एक प्राचीन खतरे से बचाने के लिए एकजुट हो जाते हैं।
மனிதர்களும் ஆட்டோபோட்களும் பூமியை காப்பாற்ற முயற்சிக்கும்போது, ​​ஆப்டிமஸ் பிரைம் தனது படைப்பாளரை விண்வெளியில் தேடுகிறது.
మానవులు, ఆటోబాట్‌లు భూమిని ఒక ముప్పు నుండి కాపాడాలనుకోగా, ఆప్టిమస్ ప్రైమ్ అంతరిక్షంలో తన సృష్టికర్త కోసం వెతుకుతాడు.

programme.title: The Nun II
द नन II
தி நன் II
ది నన్ II
द नन II
programme.desc: In 1956 France, Sister Irene faces the terrifying demon Valak, racing against time to save a convent and the surrounding community from evil.
1956 में फ्रांस में, सिस्टर आइरीन को डरावने दानव वलाक का सामना करना पड़ता है, जो एक कॉन्वेंट और आस-पास के समुदाय को बुराई से बचाती है।
1956 ஆம் ஆண்டு பிரான்சில், மடத்தையும் நகரத்தையும் தீமை அச்சுறுத்தும் அதே வேளையில், சகோதரி ஐரீன் வாலக்கை எதிர்கொள்கிறார்.
1956 ఫ్రాన్స్‌లో, సిస్టర్ ఐరీన్ భయంకరమైన వాలక్‌ను ఎదుర్కొంటుంది, సమాజాన్ని చెడు నుండి కాపాడటానికి కాలంతో పోటీపడుతుంది.

programme.title: Shazam! Fury of the Gods
शाज़म! फ्यूरी ऑफ द गॉड्स
ஷஜாம்! ஃபியூரி ஆஃப் த காட்ஸ்
షాజమ్! ఫ్యూరీ ఆఫ్ ద గాడ్స్
programme.desc: Bestowed with superpowers, Shazam and his foster siblings join forces against the daughters of Atlas who have stolen the Wizard's broken staff.
महाशक्तियों से संपन्न, शाज़म और उसके पालक भाई-बहन एटलस की बेटियों के खिलाफ सेना में शामिल हो जाते हैं, जिन्होंने जादूगर के टूटे हुए कर्मचारियों को चुरा लिया है।
மந்திரவாதியின் உடைந்த தடியை திருடிய அட்லஸின் மகள்களுடன் மோத ஒன்றுசேரும் சக்திகளை கொண்ட ஷஜாம் மற்றும் உடன்பிறப்புகள்.
షాజమ్, అతని పెంపుడు తోబుట్టువులు విజార్డ్ విరిగిన దండం దొంగిలించిన అట్లాస్ కుమార్తెలకు వ్యతిరేకంగా పోరాడతారు.

programme.title: Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga
फ्यूरियोसा: ए मैड मैक्स सागा
ஃப்யூரியோசா: அ மேட் மேக்ஸ் சாகா
ఫ్యూరియోసా: ఎ మ్యాడ్ మాక్స్ సాగా
programme.desc: Stuck in the middle of the conflict between Dementus and Immortan Joe, Furiosa fights to escape from their clutches and return to her safe haven, the Green Place.
डिमेंटस और इम्मोर्टन जो के बीच संघर्ष के बीच फंसी फ्यूरियोसा उनके चंगुल से निकलने और अपने सुरक्षित आश्रय, ग्रीन प्लेस में लौटने के लिए संघर्ष करती है।
டிமென்டஸ்-இம்மார்டன் இடையேயான மோதலில் சிக்கிய ஃபியூரியோசாவை கடத்திய பிறகு, தப்பி கிரீன் பிளேஸுக்கு செல்ல போராடுகிறாள்.
డెమెంటస్ ఆమెను అపహరించిన తర్వాత ఫ్యూరియోసా తప్పించుకుని గ్రీన్ ప్లేస్‌కు తిరిగి రావడానికి పోరాడుతుంది.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Dead Reckoning
मिशन: इम्पॉसिबल -- डेड रेकनिंग
மிஷன்: இம்பாசிபிள் - டெட் ரெக்கனிங்
మిషన్: ఇంపాజిబుల్ - డెడ్ రెకానింగ్
मिशन: इम्पॉसिबल - डेड रेकोनिंग
programme.desc: When an advanced cyber weapon is on the verge of falling into the wrong hands, Ethan Hunt and his team must embark on a challenging mission to save the world from destruction.
एक उन्नत साइबर हथियार, गलत हाथों में जाने वाला होता है, तब ईथन हंट और उसकी टीम, दुनिया को विनाश से बचाने के लिए एक चुनौतीपूर्ण मिशन पर निकलती है।
ஒரு மேம்பட்ட சைபர் ஆயுதம் தவறான கைகளில் விழும் நிலையில், ​​ஈதன் ஹன்ட்டும் குழுவினரும் உலகை அழிவிலிருந்து காக்க வேண்டும்.
ఈథన్ హంట్, అతని బృందం ఒక అధునాతన సైబర్ ఆయుధం దుర్మార్గుల చేతుల్లోకి వెళ్లకుండా నిరోధించడానికి ఒక మిషన్‌ను చేపడతారు.

programme.title: The Karate Kid
द कराटे किड
த கராத்தே கிட்
ది కరాటే కిడ్
द कराटे किड
programme.desc: Dre, a young boy, finds himself bullied by Cheng, a rebellious kung fu prodigy at his school. However, things change after he befriends Mr Han, a maintenance man, who happens to be a kung fu expert.
एक बच्चे ड्रे को उसके स्कूल का कुंग फू विजेता चेंग धमकाता है। हालाँकि, जब वह मिस्टर हान नामक एक रखरखाव करने वाले व्यक्ति से दोस्ती करके कुंग फू एक्सपर्ट बन जाता है, तो हालात बदल जाते हैं।
தனது பள்ளியில் செங்கால் கொடுமைப்படுத்தப்படுவதை உணரும் ட்ரே, அவனை எதிர்க்க குங் ஃபூ நிபுணரிடமிருந்து குங்ஃபூ கற்கிறார்.
కుంగ్ ఫూ నేర్చిన చెంగ్ బెదిరింపులకు గురవుతున్న డ్రే, కుంగ్ ఫూ నిపుణుడైన మిస్టర్ హాన్‌తో స్నేహంచేశాక పరిస్థితులు మారతాయి.
ड्रेला, त्याच्या शाळेतील चेंग हा कुंग फू खेळाडू त्रास देत असतो, पण ड्रेची हानसोबत मैत्री झाल्यावर परिस्थिती बदलते.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Extinction
रेजिडेंट ईविल: इक्स्टिंगशन
ரெஸிடெண்ட் ஈவில்: எக்ஸ்டிங்க்ஷன்
రెసిడెంట్ ఈవిల్: ఎక్స్‌టింక్షన్
रेसिडेंट ईव्हल: एक्सटिंगशन
programme.desc: During a zombie apocalypse engineered by the Umbrella Corporation, Alice and a group of survivors journey across the country in search of supplies and a safe place.
अम्ब्रेला कॉर्पोरेशन द्वारा रचित ज़ोंबी सर्वनाश के दौरान, ऐलिस और बचे हुए लोगों का एक समूह आपूर्ति और सुरक्षित स्थान की तलाश में देश भर में यात्रा करता हैं।
அம்ப்ரெல்லா கார்ப்பரேஷன் ஜாம்பி மூலம் உண்டாக்கிய பேரழிவால் பொருட்களையும் பாதுகாப்பையும் தேடும் ஆலிஸ் மற்றும் தப்பியோர்.
జోంబీ అపోకలిప్స్ సమయంలో ఆలిస్, ప్రాణాలతో బయటపడిన బృందం సామాగ్రి, సురక్షితమైన స్థలం కోసం దేశవ్యాప్తంగా ప్రయాణిస్తారు.
अम्ब्रेला कॉर्पोरेशनच्या झोम्बी सर्वनाशाच्या वेळी अ‍ॅलिस व वाचलेला एक गट सुरक्षित ठिकाणाच्या शोधात देशभर फिरतो.

programme.title: Final Score
फाइनल स्कोर
ஃபைனல் ஸ்கோர்
ఫైనల్ స్కోర్
फायनल स्कोअर
programme.desc: When two terrorists kidnap former soldier Michael Knox's niece, he employs all of his skills to rescue her and possibly foil a plan of mass destruction as well.
दो आतंकवादी पूर्व सैनिक माइकल की भतीजी का अपहरण करते हैं, तब वह अपने हर तरह के हुनर का उपयोग करके उनकी योजना को विफल करके लड़की को बचाने की कोशिश करता है।
இரு பயங்கரவாதிகள் மைக்கேல் நாக்ஸின் மருமகளை கடத்தும்போது, ​​அவர் அவளை மீட்க தனது அனைத்து திறமைகளையும் பயன்படுத்துகிறார்.
ఒక మాజీ సైనికుడు మైఖేల్, ఇద్దరు తీవ్రవాదులు చేసిన విధ్వంస ప్రణాళికను విఫలం చేసి, వారి నుండి తన మేనకోడలిని కాపాడుకుంటాడు.
2 अतिरेक्यांनी एका माजी सैनिकाच्या पुतणीचे अपहरण केल्यावर तो हुशारीने तिला वाचवून त्यांच्या योजनेत अडथळे आणण्याचे ठरवतो.

programme.title: City Lights
सिटी लाइट्स
சிட்டி லைட்ஸ்
సిటీ లైట్స్
सिटी लाईट्स
programme.desc: The Tramp falls in love with a girl with visual impairment who sells flowers on the street. He tries to help her gain her eyesight back with the help of a wealthy man.
ट्रम्प को सड़क पर फूल बेचने वाली एक दृष्टिहीन लड़की से प्यार हो जाता है। वह एक अमीर आदमी की मदद से उसकी आँखों की रोशनी वापस पाने में मदद करने की कोशिश करता है।
தெருவில் பூக்கள் விற்கும் பார்வையற்ற பெண்ணை காதலிக்கும் நாடோடி,ஒரு பணக்காரனின் உதவியால் மீண்டும் பார்வை பெற முயலுகிறான்.
వీధిలో పూలు అమ్ముకునే అంధురాలితో ప్రేమలో పడిన దేశదిమ్మరి ఒక సంపన్నుడి సహాయంతో ఆమె కంటిచూపు తిరిగి తీసుకురావాలనుకుంటాడు.

programme.title: Pay Day
पे डे
பே டே
పే డే
पे डे
programme.desc: A bricklayer's plans of having a fun weekend go for a toss when he finds it difficult to reach home during a downpour. When he finally reaches home, he realises that his wife is angry with him.
एक मिस्त्री की सप्ताहांत बिताने की योजनायें तब धरी की धरी रह जाती हैं जब उसे बारिश में घर पहुँचने में मुश्किल होती है। जब वह आखिरकार घर पहुँचता है, तो उसे पता चलता है कि उसकी पत्नी उससे नाराज़ है।
வாரக்கடைசியை கொண்டாடும் கொத்தனாரின் திட்டம் பயங்கர மழையால் தோல்வியடைகிறது. அதனால் அவரது மனைவி அவர் மீது கோபமடைகிறாள்.
వారాంతాన్ని సరదాగా గడపాలని ఒక ఇటుక పనివాడు చేసే ప్రణాళికలు, భారీ వర్షంలో ఇంటికి చేరుకోవడం కష్టంగా మారుతుంది.

programme.title: Hours
आवर्स
ஹார்ஸ்
అవర్స్
आर्स
programme.desc: Nolan Hayes faces challenges to keep Abigail, his newborn daughter who is on a ventilator, alive when Hurricane Katrina impacts the functionality and electricity of the hospital.
तूफ़ान कैटरीना के कारण अस्पताल की कार्यक्षमता और बिजली के प्रभावित होने से नोलन हेस वेंटिलेटर के सहारे जीती अपनी नवजात बेटी एबिगेल को बचाने के लिए चुनौतियों का सामना करते है।
கத்ரீனா சூறாவளியால், தனது பிறந்த மகள் அபிகேலை உயிருடன் வைத்திருப்பதில் நோலன் ஹேய்ஸ் சவால்களை எதிர்கொள்கிறார்.
వారి అకాల కుమార్తెకు జన్మనిచ్చేటపుడు అతని భార్య మరణించిన తర్వాత,నోలన్ హాయేస్ తమ బిడ్డను ప్రాణంతో ఉంచాలని ప్రయత్నిస్తాడు.

programme.title: Edge of Tomorrow
एज़ ऑफ टूमारो
எட்ஜ் ஆஃப் டுமாரோ
ఎడ్జ్ ఆఫ్ టుమారో
एज ऑफ टुमारो
programme.desc: A soldier in an alien war repeats the same day each time he dies, teaming up with a skilled warrior to find and destroy the enemy's power source and break the time loop.
योद्धा रीटा व्रतस्की की मदद से, मेजर विलियम केज को समय के चक्र में फँसकर पृथ्वी और मानव जाति को एक विदेशी प्रजाति से बचाना पड़ता है।
ரீட்டா வ்ரட்ஸ்கி உதவியோடு கால வளையில் சிக்கிய மேஜர் வில்லியம் கேஜ் ஏலியன்களிடமிருந்து பூமியை காப்பாற்ற வேண்டும்.
యోధుడు రీటా వ్రటాస్కి సహాయంతో, మేజర్ విలియం కేజ్ గ్రహాంతర జాతుల నుండి భూగ్రహాన్ని, మానవజాతిని రక్షించాలి.

programme.title: Now You See Me
नाउ यू सी मी
நௌ யூ சீ மீ
నౌ యూ సీ మీ
नाऊ यू सी मी
programme.desc: Four talented magicians are plucked from obscurity to become the Four Horsemen - a group of stage illusionists who soon attract the attention of the FBI.
सड़कों पर प्रदर्शन करने वाले चार जादूगर एक बीमा कंपनी के मालिक की भारी मात्रा में धनराशि चुरा लेते हैं, जबकि पुलिस अधिकारी उनका पीछा कर रहे होते हैं।
ஒரு காப்பீட்டு அதிபருக்குச் சொந்தமான மிகப்பெரிய தொகையை கொள்ளையடித்த நான்கு தெரு மந்திரவாதிகளை பிடிக்க துரத்தும் போலீஸ்.
ఒక ఫెడరల్ ఏజెంట్, ఇంటర్‌పోల్ డిటెక్టివ్ అవినీతిపరులైన వ్యాపార నాయకులను దోచుకునే ఇంద్రజాలికులను పట్టుకోవాలనుకుంటారు.

programme.title: Dungeons & Dragons: Honor Among Thieves
डन्जन्स एण्ड ड्रैगन्स: आनर अमंग थीव्ज़
டஞ்சன்ஸ் அண்ட் டிராகன்ஸ்: ஹானர் அமங்க் தீவ்ஸ்
డంజన్స్ అండ్ డ్రాగన్స్: హానర్ అమాంగ్ థీవ్స్
डंजन्स अँड ड्रॅगन्स: ऑनर अमंग थीव्हज्
programme.desc: A thief with a tragic past joins a band of adventurers in attempting to retrieve a lost relic. However, their quest goes awry when they cross the wrong people.
दुखद अतीत वाला एक चोर, एक खोई हुई प्राचीन वस्तु को वापस लाने की कोशिश में साहसी लोगों के एक समूह में शामिल हो जाता है। लेकिन, जब वे गलत लोगों से पंगा ले लेते हैं, तो उनका यह अभियान गड़बड़ा जाता है।
தொலைந்து போன ஒரு நினைவுச்சின்னத்தை மீட்டெடுக்கும் முயற்சியில் ஒரு திருடன் சாகசக்காரர்கள் குழுவுடன் இணைகிறான்.
విషాదకరమైన గతం ఉన్న ఒక దొంగ, పోగొట్టుకున్న అవశేషాన్ని తిరిగి పొందే ప్రయత్నంలో సాహసికుల బృందంతో చేరతాడు.

programme.title: Apocalypto
अपोकैलिप्टो
அபோகேலிப்டோ
అపోకలిప్టో
अपोकॅलिप्टो
programme.desc: A mettlesome tribesman must do whatever it takes to protect himself and his family from a multitude of threats during the Mayan civilisation's waning years.
माया सभ्यता के पतन के वर्षों के दौरान एक साहसी आदिवासी खुद को और अपने परिवार को अनेकों खतरों से बचाने के लिए हर संभव प्रयास करता है।
மாயன் நாகரிகத்தின் அழிவின்போது அச்சுறுத்தல்களிலிருந்து தன்னையும் குடும்பத்தையும் பாதுகாக்க முயலும் ஒரு பழங்குடியினர்.
ఒక గిరిజనుడు మయాన్ నాగరికత అంతరించిపోతున్న కాలంలో ఎదురవుతున్న ముప్పుల నుండి తనని, తన కుటుంబాన్ని కాపాడుకోవాలి.

programme.title: Rush Hour 2
रश आर 2
ரஷ் ஹவர் 2
రష్ అవర్ 2
रश आवर 2
programme.desc: Detective James Carter and Chief Inspector Lee return to action after a bomb explosion at the US Embassy in Hong Kong.
हांगकांग में अमेरिकी दूतावास में बम विस्फोट के बाद जासूस जेम्स कार्टर और मुख्य निरीक्षक ली कार्रवाई पर लौटते हैं।
ஹாங்காங்கில் உள்ள அமெரிக்க தூதரகத்தில் வெடிகுண்டு வெடித்த பிறகு மீண்டும் நடவடிக்கைக்கு திரும்பும் கார்ட்டர் மற்றும் லீ.
డిటెక్టివ్ కార్టర్, ఇన్‌స్పెక్టర్ లీ హాంకాంగ్‌లోని అమెరికా రాయబార కార్యాలయంలో జరిగిన బాంబు పేలుడును దర్యాప్తు చేస్తారు.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Dead Reckoning
मिशन: इम्पॉसिबल -- डेड रेकनिंग
மிஷன்: இம்பாசிபிள் - டெட் ரெக்கனிங்
మిషన్: ఇంపాజిబుల్ - డెడ్ రెకానింగ్
मिशन: इम्पॉसिबल - डेड रेकोनिंग
programme.desc: When an advanced cyber weapon is on the verge of falling into the wrong hands, Ethan Hunt and his team must embark on a challenging mission to save the world from destruction.
एक उन्नत साइबर हथियार, गलत हाथों में जाने वाला होता है, तब ईथन हंट और उसकी टीम, दुनिया को विनाश से बचाने के लिए एक चुनौतीपूर्ण मिशन पर निकलती है।
ஒரு மேம்பட்ட சைபர் ஆயுதம் தவறான கைகளில் விழும் நிலையில், ​​ஈதன் ஹன்ட்டும் குழுவினரும் உலகை அழிவிலிருந்து காக்க வேண்டும்.
ఈథన్ హంట్, అతని బృందం ఒక అధునాతన సైబర్ ఆయుధం దుర్మార్గుల చేతుల్లోకి వెళ్లకుండా నిరోధించడానికి ఒక మిషన్‌ను చేపడతారు.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
स्पाइडर-मैन टू
ஸ்பைடர்-மேன் 2
స్పైడర్-మాన్ 2
स्पायडर-मॅन 2
programme.desc: After losing his job, lover and his powers, Peter Parker feels dissatisfied with his life. Soon, amidst all this chaos, he also has to fight Doctor Octavius who poses a threat to the New York.
अपनी नौकरी, प्रेमी और अपनी शक्तियों को खोने के बाद, पीटर पार्कर अपने जीवन से असंतुष्ट महसूस करता है। जल्द ही, उसे डॉक्टर ऑक्टेवियस से भी लड़ना पड़ता है जो न्यूयॉर्क के लिए खतरा बन जाता है।
வாழ்வில் திருப்தியற்றதாக இருக்கும் பீட்டர் பார்கர், நியூயார்கை அழிக்க அச்சுறுத்தும் டாக்டர் ஆக்டோபஸுடன் போராட வேண்டும்.
తన ఉద్యోగం, ప్రేయసి, శక్తులను కోల్పోయి తన జీవితం పట్ల అసంతృప్తిగాఉన్న పీటర్ పార్కర్ డా. ఆక్టేవియస్‌తో పోరాడవలసి ఉంటుంది.

programme.title: Johnny English Strikes Again
जॉनी इंग्लिश स्ट्राइक्स अगेन
ஜானி இங்க்லீஷ் ஸ்ட்ரைக்ஸ் அகேன்
జానీ ఇంగ్లీష్ స్ట్రైక్స్ ఎగైన్
programme.desc: When a hacker reveals the identities of Britain's undercover agents, British agent Johnny English springs back into action and must overcome the challenges of modern technology.
जब एक हैकर ब्रिटेन के अंडरकवर एजेंटों की पहचान उजागर कर देता है, तो ब्रिटिश एजेंट जॉनी इंग्लिश फिर से एक्शन में आ जाता है और उसे आधुनिक तकनीक की चुनौतियों का सामना करना पड़ता है।
பிரிட்டனிலுள்ள இரகசிய முகவர்களின் அடையாளங்களை வெளிப்படுத்தும் ஹேக்கர் கண்டறிய முயலும் ஜானி, பல சவால்களை கடக்க வேண்டும்.
ప్రభుత్వ సమాచారాన్ని సంగ్రహించి, బ్రిటన్ రహస్య ఏజెంట్ల వివరాలను బయటపెట్టిన హ్యాకర్ ను పట్టుకోవడానికి జానీని నియమిస్తారు.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Kong
गॉडज़िला वर्सेस काँग
காட்ஸில்லா வெர்ஸஸ் காங்
గాడ్జిల్లా వర్సెస్ కాంగ్
programme.desc: King Kong is transported out of his containment zone after Godzilla resurfaces and creates mayhem. Humans need his help to reach Hollow Earth and find a way to subdue the king of the monsters.
गॉडज़िला का आतंक होने के बाद, किंग काँग को उसके नियंत्रण क्षेत्र से बाहर ले जाया जाता है। मनुष्यों को हॉलो अर्थ तक पहुँचने और राक्षसों के राजा को वश में करने का तरीका खोजने में उसकी मदद की ज़रूरत है।
காட்ஜில்லா அழிவு பாதையில் பயணிக்கும்போது, ​​காங்கை நோக்கி திரும்பும் மனிதர்கள்.
గాడ్జిల్లా నగరంలో విధ్వంసం సృష్టించినప్పుడు రాక్షసుల రాజును లొంగదీసుకోవడానికి మానవులు కింగ్ కాంగ్ సహాయాన్ని పొందుతారు.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon
ट्रांसफॉर्मर्स: डार्क ऑफ द मून
ட்ரான்ஸ்ஃபார்மர்ஸ்: டார்க் ஆஃப் தி மூன்
ట్రాన్స్‌ఫార్మర్స్: డార్క్ ఆఫ్ ది మూన్
programme.desc: The Decepticons are trying to learn the secrets of a stranded Cybertronian spacecraft. Sam Witwicky and the Autobots must stop them before it is too late.
डिसेप्टिकॉन्स एक फंसे हुए साइबरट्रोनियन अंतरिक्ष यान के रहस्यों को जानने की कोशिश करते हैं। समय रहते सैम विटविकी और ऑटोबोट्स को उन्हें रोकना होगा।
சிக்கித் தவிக்கும் சைபர்ட்ரோனியன் விண்கலத்தின் ரகசியங்களைக் கற்றுக்கொள்ள டிசெப்டிகான்கள் முயற்சிக்கின்றனர்.
దుష్ట ప్రయోజనాల కోసం ఉపయోగించే ముందు చంద్రునిపై దాగి ఉన్న సైబర్ట్రోనియన్ రహస్యాన్ని సామ్ మరియు ఆటోబాట్స్ కనుగొనాలి.

programme.title: Rambo III
